title: cyathea intramarginalis
intro: Cyathea intramarginalis, also known as the marginal tree fern, is a species of fern in the family Cyatheaceae, native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyathea intramarginalis include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
